justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering concrete alternatives, leading to a frustrating loop.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly checked for the same unavailable times, leading to multiple avoidable round-trips and a very inefficient conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was extremely frustrating due to the agent's inability to offer alternative times and its repetitive responses, making the user feel stuck in a loop.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times or days, even when the user explicitly stated they would consider other options, made the conversation very inefficient and frustrating.
